summary:
The dataset has been successfully pre-processed.

The cleaned dataset contains 25 rows and 6 columns. The columns are `order_item_id`, `order_id`, `product_id`, `quantity`, `unit_price`, and `line_total`.

The pre-processing involved removing duplicate entries and ensuring that the numeric fields (`quantity`, `unit_price`, `line_total`) were correctly formatted, with any invalid rows being dropped.
